items.situation: mock interview sessions with alumni volunteers
items.announcement: Good afternoon, students. Next Wednesday the Career Center is running mock interview sessions in Dwyer Hall, where alumni volunteers from finance, engineering, and healthcare will act as hiring managers. Each thirty-minute slot ends with detailed feedback on your answers and body language, so you'll leave knowing exactly what to sharpen before the spring recruiting rush. Slots are limited and tend to fill within a day, so reserve yours through the Career Center portal by Monday evening. Please arrive dressed as you would for a real interview and bring two copies of your résumé.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To promote mock interview sessions with alumni
options.B: To recruit alumni as long-term career mentors
options.C: To explain new rules for the Career Center portal
options.D: To warn that interview help is unavailable this term

questions.explanation: 通告的核心是宣传由校友担任面试官的模拟面试机会并鼓励学生预约，A 正确。B 通告是请校友当面试官做反馈，并非招募校友做长期导师，属错误目的；C 通告只是让学生通过门户预约，并未讲门户的新规则，属过窄且偏离主旨；D 通告是提供面试帮助，说其不可用与内容相反，属反向意图。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the mock interview slots?

options.A: They are guaranteed to lead to job offers
options.B: They are open only to graduating seniors
options.C: They are likely to be claimed quickly
options.D: They include feedback on answers and body language

questions.explanation: 通告说名额有限且往往一天内就被抢光，由此可推断名额会很快被占满，C 正确。A 模拟面试只是练习，说必然带来工作录用属过度推断；B 通告说面向所有学生，说仅限应届毕业生属无根据的推断；D 每场结束提供答题与肢体语言反馈是通告直接陈述的事实，属原文复述而非推断。

items.situation: student research poster session open to all majors
items.announcement: Attention students. The Undergraduate Research Society is hosting its fall poster session next Friday afternoon in the Hartley Commons, and every major is welcome to present. Whether your project is a lab experiment, a community survey, or a creative portfolio, you can share it on a single poster board. We'll provide the boards and easels; you just bring your printed poster and a short explanation for visitors. To claim a spot, submit the online form on our society page by this Wednesday. Snacks and coffee will be available throughout the afternoon.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To explain how to print a research poster
options.B: To invite all majors to a poster session
options.C: To announce the winners of a research competition
options.D: To limit the poster session to science majors

questions.explanation: 通告是邀请各专业学生来参加海报展示会，B 正确。A 通告只字未提如何打印海报，属过窄且偏题；C 这是展示会而非评奖公布，属错误目的；D 通告强调欢迎所有专业，说仅限理科专业与原文相反，属反向意图。

questions.stem: What are students asked to bring to the session?

options.A: Poster boards and easels for display
options.B: A printed copy of their research paper
options.C: A completed registration form on paper
options.D: A printed poster and a short explanation

questions.explanation: 通告明确说学生只需带打印好的海报和给参观者的简短说明，D 正确。A 展板和支架由主办方提供，学生不需自带，属信息颠倒的错误细节；B 通告说带海报而非完整论文，属看似合理但未提及；C 报名用的是网上表格，且说的是提交表格而非到场带纸质表，属张冠李戴。

items.situation: campus bookstore moving to a new building
items.announcement: The campus bookstore will move from Weller Hall to the new Commons building over spring break. The Weller Hall store closes on March 8th, and the Commons location opens on March 18th. In between, textbook pickups and online order returns will run from a temporary counter in the library lobby. The new store adds a used-textbook exchange and a self-checkout area to cut down on lines. Faculty ordering course materials for next term should send their lists to the new Commons address.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To advertise a clearance sale at the bookstore
options.B: To describe the new self-checkout system
options.C: To inform students the bookstore is relocating
options.D: To announce the bookstore is closing permanently

questions.explanation: 通告的主旨是告知书店将搬迁到新楼并说明过渡安排，C 正确。A 通告完全没提打折促销，属错误目的；B 自助结账只是新店的一个附带功能，属过窄细节；D 书店是搬迁而非永久关闭，与原文相反，属反向意图。

questions.stem: Where can students pick up textbooks during the move?

options.A: At a temporary counter in the library
options.B: At the Commons location starting March 8th
options.C: At the residence hall front desks
options.D: At the used-textbook exchange in Weller Hall

questions.explanation: 通告说过渡期间课本领取和退货在图书馆大厅的临时柜台办理，A 正确。B 新的 Commons 店 3 月 18 日才开，3 月 8 日是旧店关闭日，日期与地点均错，属错误细节；C 通告从未提到宿舍前台，属看似合理但未提及；D 旧书交换区是新店的功能，并不在 Weller Hall，属张冠李戴。

items.announcement: The senior capstone presentations are set for the last week of April in the Ridgeway Auditorium. Each graduating student in the design program will present a final project to a panel of faculty and invited guests. The full schedule, showing every presenter's time slot, is now posted outside the department office and on the program website. Presenters should upload their slides to the shared drive at least two days before their assigned date. Everyone is welcome to attend and cheer on the graduating class.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To recruit judges for the capstone panel
options.B: To remind presenters to upload their slides
options.C: To cancel this year's capstone presentations
options.D: To announce the schedule for capstone presentations

questions.explanation: 通告的主旨是宣布毕业设计展示的时间安排并说明日程发布方式，D 正确。A 评审小组由教师和嘉宾组成，通告并非招募评审，属错误目的；B 上传幻灯片只是给展示者的一条要求，属过窄细节；C 通告是宣布展示而非取消，与原文相反，属反向意图。

questions.stem: What must presenters do before their assigned date?

options.A: Reserve a seat in the auditorium online
options.B: Upload their slides to the shared drive
options.C: Submit their final project to the department office
options.D: Post their time slot on the program website

questions.explanation: 通告要求展示者在指定日期前至少两天把幻灯片上传到共享盘，B 正确。A 通告说欢迎大家来看，并未要求在线预约座位，属看似合理但未提及；C 展示者是当场向评审展示项目，而非提前把成品交到系办公室（系办公室只是张贴日程处），属错误细节；D 日程是由系里张贴在网站上的，不是展示者自己发布，属张冠李戴。

items.situation: financial aid office workshop on scholarship applications
items.announcement: The Financial Aid Office is holding a scholarship application workshop this Thursday at 3 p.m. in Room 210 of Baxter Hall. A coordinator will walk through the university's main scholarship portal and explain how to write a strong personal statement. Bring a laptop if you have one, since part of the session is hands-on and you can start a real application on the spot. Space is limited to forty seats, so we recommend arriving a few minutes early. Students who attend will also receive a checklist of upcoming scholarship deadlines.

questions.stem: What are students advised to bring to the workshop?

options.A: A laptop for the hands-on portion
options.B: A copy of their financial aid form
options.D: A printed checklist of scholarship deadlines

questions.explanation: 通告建议学生带笔记本电脑，因为会有实操环节可以当场开始申请，A 正确。B 通告没提要带资助表格，属看似合理但未提及；C 个人陈述是会上学习如何写，并非要求提前写好带来，属错误细节；D 截止日期清单是参会后才发放的，不是学生带来的，属张冠李戴。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the workshop?

options.A: It guarantees that attendees will win a scholarship
options.B: It is required for all financial aid recipients
options.C: It may run out of available seats
options.D: It covers the university's main scholarship portal

questions.explanation: 通告说座位限四十个并建议提前几分钟到场，由此可推断可能容纳不下所有到场者，C 正确。A 工作坊只是教申请方法，说保证获得奖学金属过度推断；B 通告说建议参加，并未说所有受助学生必须参加，属无根据的推断；D 讲解学校奖学金门户是通告直接陈述的内容，属原文复述而非推断。
